com.ldtteam.structurize.gui.scantool.out: 선택된 영역의 외부 앵커는 건너뛰고, 새 앵커를 설정하려면 선택하세요
com.ldtteam.structurize.gui.scantool.sca: %s 청사진에 가능한 앵커 위치가 두 개 이상 있습니다. 하나를 선택하세요
com.ldtteam.structurize.gui.scantool.cop: 스캔 명령만 복사할 수 있습니다. 활성 스캔을 붙여넣으려면 우클릭하세요.
com.ldtteam.structurize.gui.scantool.pas: 명령 블록에 스캔 명령 이외의 내용이 포함되어 있습니다. 붙여넣으려면 먼저 지우세요.
스캔할 파일 이름을 입력해야 합니다(공백 제외).
com.ldtteam.structurize.gui.scantool.tel: 텔레포트 위치를 설정하려면 커맨드 블록을 최소 한 번 복사하거나 붙여넣어야합니다.
텔레포트 위치를 설정하려면 현재 슬롯에 스캔 영역을 설정해야 합니다.
com.ldtteam.structurize.gui.scantool.fil: 제외된 중심 원의 높이를 늘리거나 줄입니다. 곱셈 방식으로 적용됩니다. 예: 1.5
제외된 중심 원의 크기를 늘리거나 줄입니다. 곱셈 방식으로 적용됩니다. 예: 0.5
자리 표시자가 생성될 Y축 제한 오프셋을 설정합니다. (예: -1)
자리 표시자가 기존 블록에서 떨어져 있어야하는 최소 거리를 설정합니다. (예: 2)
구조물 상단 부분을 자리 표시자 채우기 기능을 사용하여 구조물이 주변 환경에 더 자연스럽게 되도록 합니다
com.ldtteam.structurize.gui.tagtool.anch: 유효한 앵커 블록이 아닙니다. 특정 타일 엔티티(예: 태그 앵커 블록)만 태그 데이터를 저장할 수 있습니다.
앵커 타일 엔티티를 저장하고 기존 태그 목록을 불러왔습니다. 이제 블록에 태그를 적용할 수 있습니다!
com.ldtteam.structurize.gui.tagtool.inva: 유효하지 않은 앵커 TE에서 tagPos 데이터를 읽으려고 했습니다
유효하지 않은 앵커 타일 엔티티 tagPos 데이터를 저장하려고 했습니다
com.ldtteam.structurize.gui.tagtool.noan: 유효한 앵커 블록에 shift + 우클릭으로 선택하세요.
com.ldtteam.structurize.gui.tagtool.nota: 먼저 블록에 적용할 유효한 태그를 입력하세요!
com.ldtteam.structurize.gui.tagtool.save: 적용됨 태그 데이터를 앵커에 성공적으로 저장했습니다
com.ldtteam.structurize.network.messages: 구조물 크기가 너무 큽니다. %s 바이트보다 크면 안 됩니다!
com.structurize.command.playernotfound: 스캔을 저장할 플레이어를 찾을 수 없습니다!
com.structurize.command.scan.no.perm: 명령어를 사용하여 스캔할 권한이 없습니다. 대신 스캔 도구를 사용하세요!
com.structurize.command.paste.no.perm: 명령어를 통해 붙여넣을 권한이 없습니다. 건설 도구를 사용하세요!
com.structurize.gui.buildtool.leave.tip: 단단한 블록에서 건설 도구를 우클릭하여 건설할 위치를 조정하세요
com.structurize.gui.buildtool.tip: ESC를 눌러 GUI를 닫고 미리 보기를 확인하세요
item.possetter.anchorpos: 앵커 위치가 x=%d y=%d z=%d로 설정되었습니다
item.possetter.firstpos: 첫번째 위치가 x=%d y=%d z=%d로 설정되었습니다
item.possetter.secondpos: 두번째 위치가 x=%d y=%d z=%d로 설정되었습니다
item.sceptersteel.badanchorpos: 스캔 도구의 앵커 위치가 스캔 영역 밖에 있습니다! shift + 우클릭으로 이동하세요!
item.sceptersteel.toobig: Schematic too big, max allowed volume is %d blocks
structurize.config.gameplay.comment: All configuration items related to the core gameplay
structurize.config.ignoreschematicsfromj: Should the default schematics be ignored (from the jar)?
structurize.config.iteratortype: The iteration order on structure placement
structurize.config.light_level.comment: -1 for same as current vanilla world, 0 to 15 (min to max) for static light level
structurize.config.maxblockschecked.comm: Max amount of blocks checked by a possible worker.
structurize.config.maxcachedchanges.comm: Max amount of undos saved. A higher number requires more memory.
structurize.config.maxcachedschematics.c: Max amount of schematics to be cached on the server.
Max world operations per tick (max blocks to place, remove, or replace).
structurize.config.render_placeholders_n: If disabled show placeholders as normal blocks, if enabled render: any (light) -> nothing, fluid (blue) -> dimension default fluid, solid (brown) -> worldgen block, tag (transparent) -> content block. Fluid and solid only work in singleplayer/for LAN owner, else it's just best guess. Currently without auto-updating
structurize.config.scan_tool_scrolling.c: Sneak+scroll on the hotbar switches scan tool slots
structurize.config.see_shared_previews.c: Once enabled you will see previews from other players within sensible distance
structurize.config.share_previews.commen: Enabling this will send most of your active previews to nearby players
structurize.config.teleport.comment: Configuration related to scan tool teleportation
structurize.config.teleportallowed.comme: If creative-mode players can use the scan tool to teleport to/from their builds.
structurize.config.teleportbuilddirectio: When teleporting to a build, land on this side of it.
structurize.config.teleportbuilddistance: When teleporting to a build, land this far away from it.
structurize.config.teleportsafety.commen: Allow teleporting a little distance away if the landing area is blocked; disable to teleport exactly to target.
structurize.config.transparency.comment: From 0 (transparent) to 1 (opaque). ALPHA FEATURE, reported bugs may not receive fix. (Minus values also mean disabled)
structurize.config.transparency.warning: Transparent rendering will in most situations look somewhat correctly. But you might face situations under which looking through transparent preview will make the rendered result weird, wrong or even may enable you to see through other things. Are you sure you want to change the transparency config?
structurize.gui.buildtool.creative_only: Structurize does not support using the build tool when in survival. Switch to creative or install MineColonies and use the MineColonies Builder.
structurize.gui.tagtool.creative_only: This tool is meant to be used in creative mode only
structurize.gui.buildtool.unexpecteddata: Invalid datafixer detected! Side-effects possible! Check log for more info!
structurize.gui.replaceblock.ambiguous_p: Transformation from %s to %s is ambiguous because the following properties are not present in the source block: %s
structurize.gui.replaceblock.null_placem: Replacement with target block "%s" may not work under certain conditions.
structurize.gui.buildtool.paste: Instantly places the structure into the world, keeping Placeholder Blocks.
structurize.gui.buildtool.pastenice: Instantly places the structure into the world, as if constructed by a Builder.
structurize.gui.undoredo.desc: List of recent Operations, click the left arrow to undo, the right arrow to redo
structurize.gui.undoredo.undo.notfound: Could not undo, operation not found
structurize.gui.undoredo.undo.inprogress: Could not undo %s currently in progress
structurize.gui.undoredo.redo.notfound: Could not redo, operation not found
structurize.gui.undoredo.redo.inprogress: Could not redo %s currently in progress
structurize.gui.delete.title: Delete Structure
structurize.gui.buildtool.show: Show Placeholder Blocks. Blocks at these positions will not be changed on placement.
structurize.gui.no.survival.handler: No Survival Handler Registered. Please use Creative Mode or Install a Mod that Provides a Survival Handler
structurize.gui.missing.pos: Click the tool on a solid block first to select a starting position
structurize.gui.manipulation.info: Use the arrow buttons on the right to move the preview around or use the configured keys. You can exit and reposition via esc and then right click again to re-enter.
structurize.pack.missing.blueprint: The Requested Blueprint does not exist on the Serverside in the same Pack. Either the Client Pack has been tampered with, or the Server Pack is outdated.
structurize.pack.equaluser.error: The server holds a pack with your player name, this might interfere with your ability to place personal scans. To avoid that you might want to delete the pack on the server side.
com.ldtteam.structurize.iterators.inward: Placement in a Circle starting from the Outside
Placement in a Circle, Placing Outer Rows up to 1 Higher
Placement in a Circle, Placing Outer Rows up to 2 Higher
Placement in a Circle, Placing Outer Rows up to 3 Higher
Placement in a Circle, Placing Outer Rows up to 4 Higher
com.ldtteam.structurize.iterators.random: Places Blocks in the x/z Plane in a Random Order
structurize.preview_renderer.exception: An error happened during blueprint preview rendering. If you do not mind, please submit latest.log to our issue tracker. Thanks!
structurize.preview_renderer.cannot_rend: Unrecoverable error occurred during rendering blueprint "%s". If you do not mind, please submit latest.log to our issue tracker. Thanks!
com.ldtteam.tag.tooltip.groundlevel: Used by the Buildtool to position the blueprint on the floor
com.ldtteam.tag.tooltip.invisible: Hide Blueprint in Buildtool like Integrated Buildings or Mineshafts
com.ldtteam.structurize.gui.switchpack.l: There are no structure packs found, please install some
com.ldtteam.structurize.gui.switchpack.p: This pack is disabled because it only exists on the client. In order to use this pack, the server must enable the config option '%s' on the server.
